gates.proofIntent: Verify Tauri v2 macOS universal app feasibility, DMG or PKG packaging, install, launch, and uninstall.
gates.executableCheck: tauri build --target universal-apple-darwin; install packaged app; launch app; uninstall app; record artifact hash and OS version.
gates.blocker: No target macOS version, signing owner, certificate, or packaging account confirmed for real package proof.

gates.proofIntent: Verify signed MSI or NSIS packaging, per-user install, launch, uninstall, and machine-wide install decision inputs.
gates.executableCheck: tauri build --runner cargo-xwin or native Windows runner; install MSI/NSIS; launch app; uninstall app; record artifact hash and Windows version.
gates.blocker: No Windows runner, target Windows version, code-signing certificate, or installer policy confirmed.

gates.proofIntent: Verify macOS signing/notarization and Windows signed installer chain.
gates.executableCheck: codesign --verify; spctl --assess; notarytool submit and staple; signtool verify on Windows installer.
gates.blocker: Developer accounts, certificates, team IDs, and release signing responsibility are not confirmed.

gates.proofIntent: Verify internal-dev, pilot, stable, and rollback channels with signed manifests and forced-update limits.
gates.executableCheck: Generate signed update manifests for all channels; switch channel URL; verify rollback serves previous signed version; verify forced update only for security or API-breaking incompatibility.
gates.blocker: Requires release channel owner and update signing key policy before execution.

gates.proofIntent: Verify API reachability, updater reachability, proxy/VPN/custom CA behavior, and readable failure messages.
gates.executableCheck: Run API and updater diagnostics through direct network, proxy, VPN, and custom CA/certificate-inspection environments; confirm redacted diagnostics.
gates.blocker: Target enterprise proxy/VPN/custom CA environments are not confirmed.

gates.proofIntent: Verify OS secure-storage plugin viability and no raw token or secret persistence.
gates.executableCheck: Store credential reference; inspect app config, logs, crash reports, and cache for token/secret patterns; verify clear-storage behavior.
gates.blocker: Requires selected Tauri secure-storage plugin or custom Rust bridge implementation in shell proof.

gates.proofIntent: Verify native bridge command boundary is explicit, permission-gated, redacted, and shell-independent.
Verify object links and runner pairing deep links resolve without bypassing permissions.
gates.executableCheck: Register app protocol; open object-link URI and runner-pairing URI; confirm central API permission check and no lease mutation.
gates.blocker: Requires minimal shell build to execute.

gates.proofIntent: Verify OS notification permission prompt timing and audit trail.
gates.executableCheck: Trigger first user-visible NotificationRecord; verify permission prompt, display result, central delivery attempt, and no silent subscription.
gates.blocker: Requires minimal shell build and OS target matrix.

gates.proofIntent: Verify central API-issued scoped pairing proof handoff to local runner after user confirmation.
gates.executableCheck: Issue pairing proof from central API; hand off through desktop bridge; runner writes AgentRun/TaskResult through central API; desktop cannot mutate lease or private runner state.
gates.blocker: Requires Agent Ring runner pairing endpoint and local runner test fixture.

gates.proofIntent: Confirm target macOS/Windows versions, release ownership, pilot channel policy, emergency rollback owner, and fallback decision recipient.
gates.executableCheck: Project Manager Agent records target OS matrix, signing owner, channel owner, rollback owner, enterprise network targets, and Electron fallback approver.
gates.blocker: PM confirmation still needed per product revision review.

fallbackDecisionRequest.requiredWhen: Any launch-blocking Tauri proof fails and no Slice 0 fix is viable.
fallbackDecisionRequest.recipient: Product Manager Agent and Project Manager Agent
